steps.title: Identify what the comparison requires
steps.content: To compare extinction risks, the answer must present both species and their contrasting risk levels. The notes show C. olivacea has high risk, while C. furcatus has little risk.

steps.title: Find which choice presents this contrast
steps.content: The correct response directly states that C. olivacea has a higher risk than C. furcatus. The others either reverse the facts, omit the actual risk comparison, or describe only one species. That confirms A is correct.
